name: dcc-web
description: DCC session character sheets and tactical maps

scripts.build: bun run --filter @dcc-web/shared build && bun run --filter @dcc-web/api build && bun run --filter @dcc-web/web build
scripts.setup: bun scripts/ensure-env.ts && bun install && bun run db:generate && bun run stack && bun run db:migrate && bun run db:seed
scripts.stack: bun scripts/with-env.ts development -- docker compose up -d --force-recreate nginx
scripts.stack:prod: bun scripts/with-env.ts production -- docker compose up -d --force-recreate nginx
scripts.server: bun scripts/ensure-env.ts && bun run build:shared && bun scripts/with-env.ts development -- bun run --filter @dcc-web/api server
scripts.bundler: bun scripts/with-env.ts development -- bun run --filter @dcc-web/web bundler
scripts.prod: bun scripts/ensure-env.ts && bun scripts/with-env.ts production -- bun scripts/prod-run.ts
scripts.db:migrate:prod: bun scripts/with-env.ts production -- bun run db:migrate
